emails.subject: Re: Xtra Gas bought @ COH
emails.body: Deal 150348. I have it in Sitara as 833 day for the 15th-31st. This deal is secondary recallable, which means the gas don't flow if secondary transport gets cut. From: Joann Collins ENRON 01/22/2000 03:39 PM
